header.bismillahSubtitle: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
header.tagline: "Principle-driven, health-conscious, and disciplined - grounded in tradition, focused on growth."

text.housingNote: Our old house has been demolished and the land is kept. Inshallah, a new house will be built very soon.
text.about1: Alhamdulillah, I lead a disciplined, value-driven life rooted in Islamic principles and traditional South Indian Muslim culture. My daily routines prioritize health, consistency, and long-term growth - both worldly and spiritual.
text.about2: I believe in simple living, strong family bonds, and fulfilling responsibilities with sincerity. Committed to building a home grounded in taqwa, mutual respect, and purposeful living.
text.aboutSupport: Inshallah, I will always support you and stand by your side in every situation. My mother and sisters will also welcome and support you wholeheartedly.
text.mahr1: InshaAllah, whatever she asks for as Mahr, I am willing to give. My personal desire is to give her 80 grams of gold.
text.mahr2: Alhamdulillah, from the salary I earned from the job that Allah blessed me with, I have already bought 86 grams of gold for the Mahr.
text.mahr3: This gold does not belong to my mother, sister, or any family member - it is solely reserved for the Mahr.
text.groomSide1: Alhamdulillah, we do not expect or request anything from the bride or her family.
text.groomSide2: Our intention for this marriage is based on faith, good character, and mutual understanding, not material things.
text.groomSide3: We sincerely pray to Allah (SWT) to bless this marriage with barakah, peace, and happiness, and our main desire is to build a life based on Islamic values, respect, and kindness.
text.groomSide4: We only seek the sincere duas and blessings from the bride and her parents, especially from her mother and father.
text.future1: I come from a simple background and currently do not own land or large wealth. However, Alhamdulillah, Allah has blessed me with a good career and the opportunity to grow while striving to practice Islam sincerely.
text.future2: I believe that rizq comes from Allah, and with His blessings and consistent effort, I hope to continue improving in both Deen and Dunya.
text.future3: InshaAllah, in the future I aim to buy land, build our own home, and start a business to provide a stable and comfortable life for my family.
text.futureQuote: My intention is to build a marriage based on Deen, mutual respect, and supporting each other in obeying Allah and following the Sunnah.
text.partner1: Seeking a practicing Muslimah of good character, strong deen, and a family-oriented mindset. She should value simplicity, maintain a clean lifestyle, and be willing to build a home grounded in Islamic principles, mutual respect, and purposeful growth together.
text.partnerLanguage: Language is not a major barrier. Urdu speakers are welcome, and basic understanding of Tamil or English would be helpful for communication.
text.partnerQuote: I wish to build a peaceful Islamic family where we practice Islam together and support each other in faith, life, and responsibilities.
text.quranQuote: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them

preferredQualities.text: Hafiza or currently pursuing Hifz (highly preferred)
Strives to practice Islam sincerely & follow the Sunnah
Upholds Tawhid and Islamic principles in daily life
Good education along with commitment to practising Islam
